questions.question: What does "成语" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Idiom

questions.question: What does "卧虎藏龙" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Hidden talents

questions.question: What does "异曲同工" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Different paths, same result

questions.question: What does "深邃" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Deep and profound

questions.question: What does "阐述" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Elucidate

questions.question: What does "启蒙" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Enlightenment

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 这部著作___了作者对人性的深刻理解。
questions.correct_answer: 阐述

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 他的研究虽然采用了不同的方法，却___。
questions.correct_answer: 异曲同工

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 这个城市___着许多被忽视的人才。
questions.correct_answer: 卧虎藏龙

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 他的思想___而富有洞察力。
questions.correct_answer: 深邃

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 这部电影对现代人的___产生了深远的影响。
questions.correct_answer: 启蒙

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 他___了一套独特的理论框架。
questions.correct_answer: 建构

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: This work elucidates the contradictions of human nature through a complex narrative structure
questions.correct_answer: This work elucidates the contradictions of human nature through a complex narrative structure
questions.audio: 这部作品通过复杂的叙事结构来阐述人性的矛盾

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: The artists' styles are the same
Although the two artists have completely different styles, their works achieve the same effect
questions.correct_answer: Although the two artists have completely different styles, their works achieve the same effect
questions.audio: 虽然两位艺术家的风格截然不同，但他们的作品却异曲同工

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: This community has hidden talents, many outstanding scholars
questions.correct_answer: This community has hidden talents, many outstanding scholars
questions.audio: 这个社区卧虎藏龙，有许多杰出的学者

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: His argument is deep and profound and persuasive
questions.correct_answer: His argument is deep and profound and persuasive
questions.audio: 他的论述深邃而富有说服力

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: The enlightenment thought of this era had a profound impact on modern civilization
questions.correct_answer: The enlightenment thought of this era had a profound impact on modern civilization
questions.audio: 这个时代的启蒙思想对现代文明产生了深刻的影响

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: He constructed a grand theoretical system
questions.correct_answer: He constructed a grand theoretical system
questions.audio: 他建构了一个宏大的理论体系

questions.question: Translate to target language: "This masterpiece elucidates the depths of human emotion"
options: 这部杰作阐述了人类情感的深度
questions.correct_answer: 这部杰作阐述了人类情感的深度

questions.question: Translate to target language: "Although their methods differ, they achieve the same result"
options: 他们的方法和结果都不同
虽然他们的方法不同，但他们异曲同工
questions.correct_answer: 虽然他们的方法不同，但他们异曲同工

questions.question: Translate to target language: "This intellectual movement contained hidden talents"
options: 这个知识运动卧虎藏龙
questions.correct_answer: 这个知识运动卧虎藏龙

questions.question: Translate to target language: "His philosophical writings are profound and insightful"
options: 他的哲学著作深邃而富有洞察力
questions.correct_answer: 他的哲学著作深邃而富有洞察力

questions.question: Translate to target language: "The Enlightenment had a transformative impact on society"
options: 启蒙运动对社会产生了深刻的影响
questions.correct_answer: 启蒙运动对社会产生了深刻的影响

questions.question: Translate to target language: "He has constructed an innovative theoretical framework"
options: 他建构了一个创新的理论框架
questions.correct_answer: 他建构了一个创新的理论框架

questions.question: 你在学术论文中要提到成语。关于「卧虎藏龙」，正确的理解是：
options: 隐藏着许多杰出的人才
questions.correct_answer: 隐藏着许多杰出的人才

questions.question: 两个艺术家用完全不同的方式创作，但效果一样好。你可以用成语说：
questions.correct_answer: 这是异曲同工

questions.question: 在讨论一个复杂的哲学问题时，你想强调其深度。你说：
options: 这个问题深邃而富有意义
questions.correct_answer: 这个问题深邃而富有意义

questions.question: 你在评价一位学者对某个理论的解释。你说：
options: 他深入地阐述了这个理论
questions.correct_answer: 他深入地阐述了这个理论

questions.question: 讨论启蒙运动对现代社会的影响时，正确的认识是：
options: 启蒙对现代文明产生了深刻的影响
questions.correct_answer: 启蒙对现代文明产生了深刻的影响

questions.question: 你在描述一位思想家的著作。他创造了一套完整的理论体系。你说：
options: 他建构了一个宏大的理论体系
questions.correct_answer: 他建构了一个宏大的理论体系
